title: Nutshell
lrc:
[00:18.00]We chase misprinted lies
[00:25.00]We face the path of time
[00:32.00]And yet I fight
[00:35.00]And yet I fight
[00:39.00]This battle all alone
[00:46.00]No one to cry to
[00:52.00]No place to call home
[01:01.00]My gift of self is raped
[01:07.00]My privacy is raked
[01:15.00]And yet I find
[01:18.00]And yet I find
[01:22.00]Repeating in my head
[01:29.00]If I can't be my own
[01:36.00]I'd feel better dead
[01:57.00]Ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh
